title: We need to improve our error message in GitHub and in logs
author: konard
extractedRequirements: Remove the repeated administrator-only CLI details line from GitHub comments and logs.
Remove the vague phrase `If this requires elevated Hive Mind access`.
When the task requester is not the authenticated Hive Mind GitHub user, ask a Hive Mind administrator to handle manual recreation or fix of the repository.
When the task requester and authenticated user match, provide direct delete, recreate, or manual repository repair guidance with example commands.
For fork divergence, inspect actual fork and upstream data before recommending force-with-lease.
When no fork-only commits exist, recommend rerunning with `--allow-fork-divergence-resolution-using-force-push-with-lease`.
When commits may be lost, list exactly what commits would be lost.
Audit other comments and logs that use similar vague `if` statements.
Collect related data under `docs/case-studies/issue-2009` and include online research, requirements, and solution plans.
Execute everything in the single prepared pull request #2010.
